description.value: Shri Navdeep Healthcare Pvt Ltd is a Mumbai-based pharmaceutical company dedicated to providing a comprehensive range of healthcare products. They specialize in manufacturing and distributing various pharmaceutical formulations, including tablets, capsules, and antiseptic solutions. The company is committed to delivering quality and effective medical solutions to meet diverse health needs.

visual_features.color_appearance: White box with black and blue text, blue/grey pattern
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Text '14 Capsules' visible on top flap, 'INTAS' logo visible on the patterned section, Hindi text present.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a white rectangular cardboard box for medication, angled slightly to show the front and a sliver of the top. The front of the box features black text detailing 'DIMETHYL FUMARATE DELAYED-RELEASE CAPSULES 120 mg' and 'DYFIRA 120' in a larger blue font, along with Hindi text below it. The bottom portion of the box has a blue and grey abstract pattern, and the top flap indicates '14 Capsules'. The product is presented against a plain, light grey background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: White and blue medication box for DYFIRA 120 mg Delayed-Release Capsules, showing product name and dosage.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Label indicates '100 + 36 STRIPS FREE', 'WASH PROOF', 'STRONG ADHESIVENESS', 'PROTECTS & HEALS'.
